user.title: Binary MoIP
user.description: Connect to your Binary MoIP controller. REST is tried first; TCP port 23 is used as a fallback.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the controller via REST or TCP.

init.title: Binary MoIP options
init.description: Enable or disable individual receivers and transmitters. Expand each section to edit.

ir_menu.title: IR display control
ir_menu.description: Select a receiver to configure IR Pronto codes for power, volume, and mute, or choose Done to save.

ir_codes.title: IR codes for {receiver}
ir_codes.description: Use Pronto hex codes. Mute is a toggle (no separate mute on/off). Leave a field blank to clear it.
